creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
That symbol was introduced after 12.1 released so it is not available on 12.1-RELEASE.

Please note that FreeBSD 12.1 is EoL'd and the package builder is using 12.2 now. The solution is upgrading your system to 12.2-RELEASE (or later) so it can execute the binaries built on 12.2.
